zh.lifeSummary: 當John Root I於1570年1月6日在英國諾薩普頓史爾米爾頓 馬爾索受洗時，他的父親Thomas Root16歲，母親Ann Burrell14歲。他於1600年7月27日與Ann Rushall在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年10月在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Root I于1570年1月6日在英国諾薩普頓史爾米爾頓 馬爾索受洗时，他的父亲Thomas Root16岁，母亲Ann Burrell14岁。他于1600年7月27日与Ann Rushall在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年10月在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Root
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for a cheerful person, from an unrecorded Middle English rote (Old English rōt) ‘glad, cheerful’.

English: from Middle English rote, route, rotte ‘rote’ (of uncertain origin but apparently ultimately akin to Welsh crwth), perhaps used for a player of the medieval stringed instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. Compare Rutter .
English: perhaps a habitational name from Wroot (Lincolnshire), from Old English wrōt ‘snout, spur of land’.

variants.name: Rooth
meanings: English: habitational name from Rowarth in New Mills (Derbyshire), from Old English rūh ‘rough’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Rutter
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French roteor, roteeur, routeeur ‘player on the rote’, a musical instrument, a kind of harp or fiddle. The regular modern development of the name would have been to Roter (rhyming with boater), and to Router or Rowter (rhyming with doubter). These variants survive in small numbers, but the principal modern form is Rutter, found in fairly large numbers across England, especially in the northeast and in the West Midlands. The shortened vowel in Rutter may have been influenced by rotte, rutte, Middle English variants of Old French rote. Compare Root 2.

English: nickname from Middle English roter, rotour ‘robber, plunderer’, also ‘scoundrel, lecher’, a borrowing of Old French rotier, Anglo-Norman French routier ‘soldier of fortune; robber, highwayman, ruffian’, though this is a less likely source of the modern surname.
Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch rut(t)er ‘freebooter, footpad’, cognate with 2 above.

variants.name: Rutt
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Root  .
German (Rütt): from a short form of the personal name Rudolf .

variants.name: Roots
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Root , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Root I was christened on 6 January 1570, in Milton Malsor, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Root, was 16 and his mother, Ann Burrell, was 14. He married Ann Rushall on 27 July 1600, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in October 1615, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Root I a été baptisé le 6 janvier 1570, à Milton Malsor, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Root, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Ann Burrell, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Ann Rushall le 27 juillet 1600, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Byfield, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Root I am 6. Januar 1570 in Milton Malsor, Northamptonshire, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Root 16 und seine Mutter Ann Burrell 14. Er hat am 27. Juli 1600 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England Ann Rushall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1615 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Root I è stato battezzato il 6 gennaio 1570 nel Milton Malsor, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Root, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Ann Burrell, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Ann Rushall il 27 luglio 1600, nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Root Iが1570年1月6日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアミルトン マルソルで洗礼を受けた時，父Thomas Rootは16歳，母Ann Burrellは14歳であった。1600年7月27日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでAnn Rushallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年10月に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブイフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Root I(이)가 1570년 1월 6일 영국 노르섬프토실르 미턴 맬소르에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Root(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Burrell(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1600년 7월 27일 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 Ann Rushall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 10월 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 비필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Root I foi batizado em 6 de janeiro de 1570, em Milton Malsor, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Root, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Ann Burrell, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Rushall em 27 de julho de 1600, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Root I был крещен 6 января 1570 г. в местности милтон малсор, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Root было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Burrell, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Rushall 27 июля 1600 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1615 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности бифиелд, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Root I se bautizó el 6 de enero de 1570, en Milton Malsor, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Root, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Ann Burrell, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Ann Rushall el 27 de julio de 1600, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
